purpose: Deferred commercialization, publication, patent, financing, and tool roadmap for B1-B10 after technical gates pass.
activation_rule: Do not treat translation outputs as current success criteria; use only after the relevant B-direction has passed its technical solution gate.
portfolio_thesis: Verification-first quantum software stack: certified compression, QEC target-volume accounting, fault-tolerant resource scheduling, and output verification.

manuscripts.title: Certified virtual-SWAP elimination for topology-aware quantum circuit compression
manuscripts.claim_gate: Reproduce virtual-SWAP benefit against at least one calibrated/live-like heavy-hex baseline and one broader benchmark family.
manuscripts.evidence_now: 30/30 circuits rewritten; 481 virtual SWAPs removed; 37.18% two-qubit reduction; 32.65% synthetic exposure reduction; proof replay passed 481/481.

manuscripts.title: Wilson-bounded target-volume accounting for QEC baselines and compiler-aware fault-tolerant scheduling
manuscripts.claim_gate: A non-aggressive or physically motivated reduced-round variant must survive larger distances/shots, leakage/correlated-noise fields, and noise-mismatch stress; then B7 needs a real workload DAG with factory-throughput variants.
manuscripts.evidence_now: B2 Stim/PyMatching 30 configs and 90,000 shots; B2 target-volume 40 combinations; B2 same-hardware reduced-round candidate 120 configs / 360,000 shots with 22 Wilson target-volume improved rows; B2 robustness stress 240 configs / 1,200,000 shots with 88 stressed improved rows, all aggressive d-4 and 0 non-aggressive d-2; B7 bridge 1.195x-1.616x conservative STV reduction.

manuscripts.title: Challenge-refresh hidden-invariant tests for classically verifiable quantum outputs
manuscripts.claim_gate: Implement circuit-level hidden task generator, challenge refresh, projection rotation, and adaptive generative spoofers.
manuscripts.evidence_now: B4 rejects four spoofing families; B8 honest completeness 1.0; B8 leakage test identifies 0.75 leakage as dangerous.

manuscripts.title: Observable-first quantum simulation descriptors for correlated chemistry and superconducting-material search
manuscripts.claim_gate: Add reaction-coordinate path, stronger tensor/boundary baseline, and real or curated materials table with leakage controls.
manuscripts.evidence_now: B3 PySCF proxy; B5 exact Hubbard cluster proxy; B6 toy descriptor ranker.

manuscripts.title: Negative-result scaffolds for quantum PCP gap amplification and BQP advantage-boundary claims
manuscripts.claim_gate: Formalize one negative lemma or two restricted theorem targets.
manuscripts.evidence_now: B9 has four counterexample candidates; B10 has 11 restricted theorem targets.

patent_disclosures.title: Measurement-aware virtual-SWAP elimination with proof replay
patent_disclosures.invention_summary: Detect routed SWAP macros, replace them with tracked logical wire and measurement maps, and emit replayable proof events.
patent_disclosures.evidence_now: 481 virtual SWAPs removed and 481/481 proof events replayed.

patent_disclosures.title: Wilson-bounded target-volume selection for QEC code and schedule choice
patent_disclosures.invention_summary: Select QEC codes, schedules, and decoder settings by confidence-bounded target space-time volume.
patent_disclosures.evidence_now: 40 surface-code target-volume combinations with Wilson 95% high criterion; same-hardware reduced-round candidate finds 22 improved target-volume rows, but robustness stress shows the positive signal is currently aggressive-only.

patent_disclosures.title: Challenge-refresh hidden-invariant verification
patent_disclosures.invention_summary: Rotate hidden invariants or projections after leakage-risk thresholds are detected.
patent_disclosures.evidence_now: 0.75 leakage identified as dangerous under adaptive spoofer stress.

patent_disclosures.title: Dependency-scheduled fault-tolerance co-design engine
patent_disclosures.invention_summary: Schedule algorithm blocks, compiler reductions, target-volume QEC rows, and factory throughput in one resource ledger.
patent_disclosures.evidence_now: B7 dependency bridge gives 1.195x-1.616x conservative STV reduction; FT synthesis ledger exposes gcm_h6 as the current min row; w8_21 claim-boundary closure shows 43480 optimizer runs, 0 exact replacements, and 0 ledger removal, so repeated templates cannot be counted as physical savings without occurrence-removing certificates.

patent_disclosures.title: Leakage-audited mechanism-aware materials descriptor ranking
patent_disclosures.invention_summary: Rank materials candidates using strong-correlation descriptors with explicit family-prior leakage audits.
patent_disclosures.evidence_now: B6 synthetic ranker, B5 cluster proxy, and B3 observable-first proxy exist.

fundable_projects.title: Quantum Compiler Assurance Platform
fundable_projects.first_customer: Quantum software teams, hardware labs, and research groups running compiler benchmarks.
fundable_projects.mvp: Q-Cert Compiler Audit CLI with HTML/JSON report export.

fundable_projects.title: QEC Target-Volume Benchmarking Service
fundable_projects.first_customer: Hardware companies, national labs, and academic architecture groups.
fundable_projects.core_assets: B2 Stim/PyMatching baseline, B2 target-volume table, B2 same-hardware schedule candidate and aggressive-only robustness boundary, B7 resource bridge.
fundable_projects.milestone_budget_target: Build reproducible runner, target-volume dashboard, same-hardware schedule stress suite, aggressive-only boundary warnings, and pilot benchmark reports.

fundable_projects.title: Quantum Verification and Spoofing Lab
fundable_projects.route: Security-oriented seed project, government grants, or enterprise pilots
fundable_projects.first_customer: Quantum cloud providers, benchmark authors, and audit teams.
fundable_projects.mvp: Hidden-task generator, spoofer library, and verification dashboard.

fundable_projects.title: Quantum-Risk and PQC Migration Adjacent Tool
fundable_projects.first_customer: Security teams needing crypto inventory and PQC migration planning.
fundable_projects.mvp: Assessment templates, inventory connectors, and executive risk reports.

tools.name: Q-Cert Compiler Audit CLI
tools.mvp: Run benchmark circuits, emit reductions, proof logs, and limitation report.
tools.deliverable_90_days: Package existing B1 scripts behind one CLI with HTML/JSON report export.

tools.name: QEC Target-Volume Bench
tools.mvp: Run Stim/PyMatching sweeps and produce Wilson-bounded target-volume tables.
tools.deliverable_90_days: Hosted or local benchmark runner with reproducible configs.

tools.name: Quantum Verification Red-Team Lab
tools.mvp: Generate hidden tasks, run spoofers, show completeness/soundness/leakage curves.
tools.paying_user: Benchmark designers and quantum cloud evaluators.
tools.deliverable_90_days: Merge B4/B8 into a shared task interface.

tools.name: Materials Descriptor Screener
tools.mvp: Rank candidate materials with leakage-audited descriptors and provenance.
tools.deliverable_90_days: Replace synthetic B6 data with curated retrospective dataset.
